title: LEGO Speed Champions Aston Martin Aramco F1 AMR24 Race Car Toy with a Collectible Formula 1 Driver Minifigure - Model Kits for 10+ Year Old Boys & Girls or Adult Motorsport Fans 77245
features: LEGO Speed Champions Aston Martin Aramco F1 AMR24 Race Car Toy with a Collectible Formula 1 Driver Minifigure - Model Kits for 10+ Year Old Boys & Girls or Adult Motorsport Fans 77245
description: From the manufacturer LEGO Aston Martin Aramco F1 AMR24 Race Car Formula 1 fans can build, display and race this LEGO Speed Champions Aston Martin Aramco F1 AMR24 Race Car toy vehicle. Hit the F1 racetrack! Kids can enjoy the unique thrills and spills of Formula 1 recreating fast-paced racing action with this detailed F1 toy car. LEGO Speed Champions Aston Martin Aramco F1 AMR24 Race Car F1 toy car for play and display Kids can build an Aston Martin Aramco F1 AMR24 Race Car. Authentic Aston Martin Aramco F1 details Race car includes team-sponsor logos and a rear wing. 1 driver minifigure Place inside the cockpit to role-play F1 races. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. More high-speed F1 action Discover other LEGO F1 building sets (sold separately) to share the excitement of Formula 1 with the whole family.
